issue.title: C: GitHub freshness — re-sync on window focus

successCriteria.description: Issues/PRs/releases re-sync on window focus / tab visibility (default ON); an issue closed on GitHub while unfocused shows closed within one focus event
Optional periodic poll is OFF by default; when enabled it is clamped to a 60s floor and gated by the GitHub rate-limit budget (#110)
The focus refresh also invalidates the detail single-issue cache (bumps the #220 detail nonce)
Pure policy helpers are unit-tested; pnpm build + desktop vitest green

phases.title: Pure freshness policy helpers + tests
phases.content: Create apps/desktop/src/utils/githubFreshness.ts: shouldRefreshOnVisibility(enabled, visibilityState), canIntervalPoll(rateLimitStatus) (gated via the #110 severityFor, fails open on unknown), effectiveIntervalMs(seconds) (null when <=0, else clamped to 60s floor). Unit tests for each.
verification: githubFreshness.ts exports the three pure helpers + MIN_POLL_SECONDS
githubFreshness.test.ts green (visibility on/off/hidden, rate-limit healthy/critical/unknown, interval off/clamped/honored)

phases.title: Wire focus/visibility refresh + opt-in interval + settings UI
phases.content: Extend GitHubSettings (settingsStore) with focusRefresh (default true) + pollIntervalSeconds (default 0). App.tsx: listen for window focus + visibilitychange → debounced refreshAll (issues/PRs/releases triggerRefetch + detail nonce bump); optional setInterval gated by canIntervalPoll(fetch_rate_limit_status). SettingsPage GitHub section: focus-refresh checkbox + poll-interval input. Coalesce persisted-state-without-new-fields with ?? defaults.
verification: settingsStore GitHubSettings has focusRefresh + pollIntervalSeconds with defaults true/0
App.tsx adds focus + visibilitychange listeners and a rate-limit-gated interval; SettingsPage exposes both
pnpm build clean; full desktop vitest green (177)
phases.summary: settingsStore GitHubSettings +focusRefresh(true)/+pollIntervalSeconds(0); App.tsx focus+visibilitychange refresh + rate-limit-gated interval + detail nonce; SettingsPage GitHub toggles. build clean, desktop 177/177.
